title: Vedanthangal Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Vedanthangal Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Vedanthangal Bird Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary in the Madurantakam taluk of the Chengalpattu district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Vedanthangal Bird Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary in the Madurantakam taluk of the Chengalpattu district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Established in 1936, it is the oldest wildlife sanctuary in India. It has been designated as a protected Ramsar site since 2022. More than 40,000 birds have been recorded in the sanctuary during the migratory season every year.

topPlaces.name: Maduranthakam Lake
topPlaces.description: Maduranthakam Lake or Maduranthakam Aeri, is a lake spread over 2400 acres in Maduranthakam, Chengalpattu district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Karunguzhi
topPlaces.description: Karunguzhi is a town in Chengalpattu district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Madurantakam block
topPlaces.description: The Madurantakam block is a revenue block in the Chengalpattu district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 58 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Madurantakam taluk
topPlaces.description: Madurantakam taluk is a taluk of Chengalpattu district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Madurantakam.

topPlaces.name: Maduranthakam
topPlaces.description: Madurantakam ([madɯɾaːn̪daɡam]) is the southernmost suburb of Chennai city and a municipality in Chengalpattu district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is known for the artificial and second largest lake in Tamil Nadu, the Madurantakam lake.

topPlaces.name: Karikili Bird Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Karikili Bird Sanctuary is a 61.21-hectare (151.3-acre) protected area located in the Chengalpattu District of the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The sanctuary is about 75 kilometres (47 mi) from Chennai, south of Chengalpattu.

topPlaces.name: Eri-Katha Ramar Temple
topPlaces.description: Eri-Katha Raamar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Rama located in the town of Maduranthakam, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is glorified by Ramanujar, Thirumalisai Alvar and classified as one of the 108 Abhimana Kshethrams of the Vaishnavate tradition.

items.note: Maduranthakam Lake or Maduranthakam Aeri, is a lake spread over 2400 acres in Maduranthakam, Chengalpattu district, Tamil Nadu, India.

Madurantakam taluk is a taluk of Chengalpattu district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Madurantakam.

Madurantakam ([madɯɾaːn̪daɡam]) is the southernmost suburb of Chennai city and a municipality in Chengalpattu district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is known for the artificial and second largest lake in Tamil Nadu, the Madurantakam lake.

Karikili Bird Sanctuary is a 61.21-hectare (151.3-acre) protected area located in the Chengalpattu District of the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The sanctuary is about 75 kilometres (47 mi) from Chennai, south of Chengalpattu.

Eri-Katha Raamar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Rama located in the town of Maduranthakam, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is glorified by Ramanujar, Thirumalisai Alvar and classified as one of the 108 Abhimana Kshethrams of the Vaishnavate tradition.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vedanthangal Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vedanthangal Bird Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vedanthangal Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (60 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (75 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vedanthangal Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vedanthangal Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vedanthangal Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Vedanthangal Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vedanthangal Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Maduranthakam Lake, Karunguzhi, Madurantakam block, Madurantakam taluk, Maduranthakam.
